export_view.value:
RepairQ’s retention policy is designed to offer a seamless transition from active use to archival and eventual deletion, giving you ample opportunity to reactivate your database if needed. Automated notifications keep you informed at every stage, and our process ensures that your data remains secure until it is no longer needed. By understanding our data retention and archival procedures, you can make informed decisions about your data and ensure its availability or deletion per your requirements.

We offer a read-only subscription option for owners to view and export data for their records. Read-only access also ensures that your account remains active, so your database will not be archived and deleted, per our Data Retention Policy.

Create a Support Ticket or call 1-877-230-6317 option 2, if you want to change your subscription to read-only or reactivate an archived database.

Additional Resources

  • Changing Your RepairQ Subscription

  • Adding and Deactivating a Location

  • Adding and Deactivating Users

  • Exporting Data in RepairQ

  • Reports: Inventory Valuation

  • Reports: Inventory Valuation Snapshot

  • Reports: Inventory End of Year (EOY) Snapshot Archive

  • RepairQ Data Retention Policy

Read-Only Rates and Features

  • Read-only access is $25/mo per active location on the database.

    • A database with one active location is $25/mo; a database with 3 active locations is $75/mo.

    • Read-only access is renewed monthly until RepairQ Support is notified to cancel the subscription.

  • Read-only access is granted at the database level; all active locations are affected.

    • Users cannot have a location running business-as-usual while another is on read-only.

  • One (1) user will have login access to the database. All other users will be deactivated.

    • Please notify RepairQ Support which user will need read-only access.

  • All existing information is viewable to the user.

    • The user will not have access to add/delete/edit existing information.

  • A user can export Standard Report information and other data, where applicable.

    • Analytic Reports and Dashboards (Powered by Looker) are not included in read-only access.

Data Retention Policy

  • ~30 Days after cancellation, an automated email is sent to the owner, notifying them that their database is prepped for archival.

    • This notification is sent to the email address set up on their billing subscription.

  • After 60 days of cancellation, the database is archived for storage.

    • During this time, the database can be reactivated at the request of the owner. There will also need to be an active subscription on the account (Standard or Read-only).

  • ~300 Days after cancellation, an automated email is sent to the owner, notifying them that their database is prepped for deletion.

    • This notification is sent to the email address set-up on their billing subscription.

  • After 365 days of database inactivity, the database is deleted.

    • After deletion, the information in the database cannot be retrieved.

START 1.21.X
